steps.title: Use the stated goal
steps.content: The student needs to identify the setting of My Ántonia, not summarize Carter's education, career, or themes.

steps.title: Choose the setting note
steps.content: The notes say some of Carter's best-known novels are set in Nebraska and list My Ántonia as one of those novels. B describes immigrants, C only identifies the novel, and D does not specify which novels are set in Nebraska. The answer is A.
